purpose: Define structured claim scope levels to prevent overclaiming in verification submissions.

claim_scope_values.description: A single verification action: one hash check, one explorer lookup, one script run.
claim_scope_values.notes: Must not claim V5 or higher. Must report limitations.

claim_scope_values.description: Multiple checks but with known gaps or limitations.
claim_scope_values.notes: Must list what is not checked. Must not claim full coverage.

claim_scope_values.description: Verification covers one or a few components but not full profile.
claim_scope_values.notes: Component levels declared individually. Must not claim V5.

claim_scope_values.description: Complete verification of a single component (e.g., all B-level targets).
claim_scope_values.notes: May claim V5 for that component only if all targets are covered.

claim_scope_values.description: Full public digital profile: all B, D, T, C, P components at required levels.
claim_scope_values.notes: Required for V5+ claims. All components must be verified.

claim_scope_values.description: Complete protocol verification including external attestations.
claim_scope_values.notes: Highest scope. Requires institutional or multi-source verification.

claim_scope_values.description: Placeholder for capabilities not yet implemented.
claim_scope_values.notes: Cannot be used for current submissions.

scope_derivation_rules.notes: Not V5 — requires full B/D/T/C/P profile
V5 requires full public digital profile

overclaim_rejection_rules.reason: Single check cannot claim full public digital scope.
V4+ requires independent tool or implementation.
V5 requires full public digital profile.

verification_scope_label_derivation.description: How to derive verification_scope_label from protocol level and evidence

mappings.condition: V4 official scripts all blocking PASS
mappings.label: official_script_audit

mappings.condition: V4 official scripts plus non-blocking limitations
mappings.label: official_script_audit_with_limitations
